seoTitle: Lillico vs Lilydale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lillico and Lilydale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lillico and Lilydale.
heading: Lillico vs Lilydale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lillico, Tasmania and Lilydale, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lillico has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lilydale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lillico or Lilydale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lillico has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Lilydale scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lillico scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Lilydale scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lillico or Lilydale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lillico has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
